daily_summary.headline: Artemis II Takes Center Stage in Space Events

top_events.title: SLS Block 1 | Artemis II Launch
top_events.description: The Artemis II mission marks NASA's first crewed lunar flyby in over 50 years, testing the Orion spacecraft's systems.
top_events.action: Watch live broadcast and follow mission updates.

top_events.title: Tianlong-3 Demo Flight
top_events.description: Space Pioneer's Tianlong-3 rocket embarks on its maiden flight, potentially carrying satellites for the SpaceSail constellation.
top_events.action: Monitor for updates on mission success.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: Russia's Soyuz-5 rocket undergoes its first test flight, a significant step in replacing the Zenit-2 and Proton Medium capabilities.
top_events.action: Stay tuned for launch outcomes and technical evaluations.

alerts.title: Artemis II Launch Alert
alerts.message: The Artemis II mission is set to launch today, marking NASA's first crewed lunar flyby in over 50 years. This historic mission will test the Orion spacecraft's systems.
alerts.action_required: Watch live broadcast and follow mission updates.
